page.name: CUE 16

pad1.name: `cue_display 1`
pad1.query: has_cue 1 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 1 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad2.name: `cue_display 2`
pad2.query: has_cue 2 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 2 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad3.query: has_cue 3 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 3 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad4.query: has_cue 4 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 4 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad5.query: has_cue 5 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 5 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad6.name: `cue_display 6`
pad6.query: has_cue 6 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 6 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad7.query: has_cue 7 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 7 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad8.name: `cue_display 8`
pad8.query: has_cue 8 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 8 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad9.name: `cue_display 9`
pad9.query: has_cue 9 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 9 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad10.name: `cue_display 10`
pad10.query: has_cue 10 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 10 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad11.name: `cue_display 11`
pad11.query: has_cue 11 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 11 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad12.name: `cue_display 12`
pad12.query: has_cue 12 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 12 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad13.name: `cue_display 13`
pad13.query: has_cue 13 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 13 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad14.name: `cue_display 14`
pad14.query: has_cue 14 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 14 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad15.name: `cue_display 15`
pad15.query: has_cue 15 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 15 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

pad16.name: `cue_display 16`
pad16.query: has_cue 16 ? play ? param_equal `get_cue` 16 ? blink 1bt : on : on : off

page.menu: Edit CUEs =[edit_poi] Read-only (lock hotcues) +[lock_cues] Smart Cue (beatmatch on play) +[smart_cue] - Quantize >> Off +[quantize_setcue off] Quantize >> Beat +[quantize_setcue on & setting 'globalQuantize' 1] Quantize >> Bar +[quantize_setcue on & setting 'globalQuantize' 4] Quantize >> Phrase (16) +[quantize_setcue on & setting 'globalQuantize' 16] Quantize >> Phrase (32) +[quantize_setcue on & setting 'globalQuantize' 32] Phrase Length >> 16 +[setting beatCounterRange 16] Phrase Length >> 32 +[setting beatCounterRange 32]
page.param2: param_equal `setting 'globalQuantize'` 1 ? setting 'globalQuantize' 4 : param_equal `setting 'globalQuantize'` 4 ? setting 'globalQuantize' 16 : param_equal `setting 'globalQuantize'` 16 ? setting 'globalQuantize' 32 : setting 'globalQuantize' 1
